reviews.review_description: Fun racing game,there is no brakes lol. I love it,the drifting is fun and the cars are very fun when your collection is up a bit,I'm at 17/33 and gonna get that 33. Some of the levels remind me of Germany,some South Korea and some Florida,my fav maps are the fields. Music is awesome as well,I forgot to take a break,lol.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review, we're glad you are enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: This game is ridiculously fun. It's like out run for VR! There's heaps of levels to get through, and each time you lose it's okay because your coins go towards unlocking a new car. Lots of content, lots of different environments. Can spend many hours sitting down playing this this. Your fuel is your health, crashing removes fuel but you're invulnerable while flashing. You need to collect boost, fuel and coins. Drifting feels fantastic and you can play this with one controller. You blow up when your out of fuel (took me a while to figure out that's the mechanics and why I was blowing up). Its a satisfying gameplay loop and I love the art style and I think it also helps with not getting motion sickness but I've got pretty good vr legs. You can steer with the stick or use a virtual steering wheel, and there's third person and first person view

developer_response.body: Appreciate the review so much, thanks for giving some love to our precious hidden gem!

reviews.review_title: easily in my top 3 favorite vr games
reviews.review_description:
i use my headset daily, and have played a lot of wonderful games, but this one has such a genuinely special place in my heart!! the soundtrack is absolutely incredible, i love the visuals so much, the handling is smooth and intuitive, and there are lots of different cars and maps to play! and no paywalls!!! 

you can easily change the music track at any time, but i almost never do because every single track has such good vibes and perfectly compliments the gameplay <3

 
i hope the devs can release more levels soon 🙏🏻 even if it's just harder versions of the night levels! i truly cannot recommend this enough, and it's such a perfect game to play when you're just chilling in bed at the end of the night. so much love to the people who made this 🤍

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the lovely words, they mean a lot to us!

reviews.review_description: This game is the funniest thing i have played in a long time. Not a lot of ppl play in first person on YouTube but its the best driving you can get on standalone quests. And the gameplay loop is so fun you don't care when you lose. I just got kcd2 and this is the only game that can pull me away from it at this time.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, super happy to know the game got you hooked so much!

reviews.review_description:
This is cool dude!!! Retrogasmic racing

A nice retro styled racing game.
It has plenty of car unlocks, plenty of locations and settings to race across too.

You can change the music during a race, but pausing and selecting a track you like.

You have to race from point A to B, collecting coins along the way and fuel cans to replenish your fuel so that you can make it to the end… can also collect nitros along the way.

Some locations have rivals which you have to beat too!

Besides the main game, there is a chill zen mode where you can just drive with no racing or traffic… and relax

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We hope you liked the game and gave you a nice retro vibe. :)

reviews.review_description: 80's style game/graphics, easy to control. It's fun.

The game is perfect it delivers what it promises and more, the first person view is a nice addition, the rivals and the cops too. Please with futures updates ad MULTIPLAYER , I'd love to play with my brother, even as an additional content. Cheers!! Keep the game updated please!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for the review! We are currently busy on other projects but we definitely have plans for Neodori Infinity in the future!

reviews.review_description: It's fun

Your gonna love this the Poe poe chases drifting rival racers and earning faster cars this game is almost perfect!! You already have the base game to earn new cars just add multiplayer and this game would be a perfect game please can you implement this Devs the store is screaming for a high energy multiplayer racer still well done Devs here's hoping for more!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, and thanks for updating the review!

reviews.review_description: This outrun styled drift/racing game had me excited after downloading the trial. After playing the complete game I am not disappointed. The game is a little short and can be completed in a few hours depending on car and skill of driver. I already finished race 33 but the game doesn't stop there, You can explore night ride, rival rush, endless mode and zen ; I must say that out of all the racing games I own for virtual reality consoles both pc vr and quest this one is my favorite. This game is pure fun and mixed with a certain nostalgia that makes this game a rare gem and should be a part of your collection. I recommend this game to all. Multiplayer mode update would solidify this game as the perfect arcade racer to date. Keep up the great work and I look forward to your updates with this game and future games that your team develops! Thank you for this game!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review, we are glad you appreciate the game. We don't have an ETA for updates right now as we are concentrating our efforts on other games, but we'd love to add some fresh new content later on.

reviews.review_description: The game loop is quite addictive but I found the difficulty spike to be very unforgiving after a few levels, it felt a bit unfair, kinda stopped me from playing unfortunately. I'll try coming back to it at some point and give it another shot, boy I thought Outrun was hard. The nestalgia feeling is spot on though, I alway wanted an Outrun in VR and this is probably the closest we will ever get but this is really its own thing, more like a competitor, with a bit of Chase HQ thrown in and there are plenty of levels to unlock, definately for gamers who like a challenge. I like the graphics style and the music is nice too. Id really like if it had a difficult adjuster easy medium and hard or getting better scores in earlier tracks to unlock the next track or paying with the money you collect to unlock later track would be good also collecting rare bonus items on the road to unlock things like new music tracks would be nice. Also future multplayer would keep this game alive. Also a continues mode like in out run where you can choose different paths would be so cool, there is a chillout continuous mode but there are no cars and its a bit boring. I really hope the dev keeps updating and adding new stuff and maybe some dlc in the future.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for the review! If you are encountering a challenge in beating rivals, just remember to stack up Nitro during the level and use it against them at the right moment. Also, there are three more game modes to unlock after beating the main campaign!

reviews.review_description: Not what I was expecting first game was way better more realistic joystick sucks and drift is not realistic they could’ve done way better .

developer_response.body: Gentle reminder that the game page clearly states this is an arcade racing game inspired by the classics of the past and the store video clearly shows the gameplay. If this isn't enough to set the right expectations, we're not sure what will. We strongly recommend to issue a refund and delete the review to avoid misleading other users. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Someone just posted about this game on a Facebook group…I bought it and have been in for an hour. It’s a great game. The steering, the drifting, the music, the retro graphics, it all feels really great! Recommended!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much, glad you are enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description:
NEODORI INFINITY IS JUST LIKE THE GREAT OLD POLYGONAL GAME’S FROM YESTERYEAR !
 BUT IN VIRTUAL REALITY ( VR ) , IT LOOK’S AND PLAY’S EVEN BETTER !
 VERY BEAUTIFUL GAME TOO , AND FAST AS A RABBIT ON THE RUN . GREAT PRICE AS WELL AND WELL REVIEWED . I’D CALL IT A WINNER !SURE !SURE !

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for the review, we're glad you are enjoying the game!

reviews.review_title: You can hardly get more for your money
reviews.review_description:
This game reminds me a lot of Horizon Chase, even if it doesn't quite come close in terms of quality, it offers a lot of content for only 10 bucks. The routes are varied and the game is wonderfully arcade. I find the comic-like graphics very appealing and the speed suits the game. Collect coins and turbos as well as tank canisters that also serve as energy, defeat rivals, race away from the police, a great soundtrack... the game simply offers everything that encourages you to play again and again. The level of difficulty is very high, but you don't lose motivation. Only the battery on my Quest 3 regularly runs out because I just can't stop playing. Thank you so much for realizing this in VR.

The next step would be more tracks and a multiplayer.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the great review! At the moment we are very busy on other projects, but we still have plans for Neodori Infinity, hopefully for the near future.

reviews.review_description:
Great Nostalgia feeling, you are inside an Arcade racing game and the best of all, third person view !!! No chance for getting dizzy, deeply appreciated this move !!!

  It is not about the graphics, but the idea and way to program the games, I remember the simplicity of my childhood games that provided great fun !!!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for the review, we are super happy to see the game evoked memories of arcade classics!

reviews.review_title: Very fun racer with a nice art style :3
reviews.review_description:
I initially have played this on the steam and switch version of the game, both in which i loved playing and this version is no exception. The art style on this game is great and the soundtrack is a vibe, best part is that you can just choose what music you wanna listen while playing in the stage, the rivals actually pose a good challenge and are fun to beat. The controls are very good and snappy and you can change the scale and position before ever starting a stage making it a lot more easier for you to just vibe on the track.

Overall i highly recommend playing this gem.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review!

reviews.review_description:
Not only is this a solid and fun game for the quest 3, it's also probably just objectively the best way to experience arcade racers like this. people pay over $20 to go into a dave and buster's to play what's essentially a worse version of this.

 Amazing game. Amazing price. Don't overpay to go sit in a plastic car that some guy spilled a tequila in a half hour ago, buy this gem instead.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for the heartfelt review, we're super happy Neodori Infinity gives you so many arcade vibes!

reviews.review_title: Hidden Gem Buried in Applab’s Purgatory
reviews.review_description:
Excellent arcade racer, reminiscent of past classics, but with its own stylish take. Soundtrack is also great and fits the overall aesthetic nicely. Controls best with thumbstick, but the game really comes to life when steering in first-person view. Has become one of my favorite games to play in VR, though the lack of multiplayer or ai racing (outside of rivals) places reasonable limitations.  

Would love to see this game get the credit it deserves from Meta and elevated to the main store, as it’s polished and ready for a larger playerbase and expansion.  Could also be fun to have a co-op mode where a passenger can join and perhaps collect nitro/gas, defend the car from thugs, help to outrun police, and of course control the stereo.  

Great job devs! Keep it up!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for the review, right now we can only hope as well! Fingers crossed!

reviews.review_description:
Having played both Neodori Forever and this game, I think I can say that I enjoyed Infinity just as much as Forever if not more. It carries over much of what I liked about it and improves upon it.

As with Forever, Neodori Infinity delivers a unique blend of chill but fast gameplay that can keep you engaged. The nature of the game makes it very easy to pick up or put down at a moment's notice.

The additional music tracks help a lot with keeping the soundscape fresh, not just between games but also within Infinity itself.
Vehicle having unique stats made unlocking new ones much more exciting.

Given that the steering wheel is entirely virtual (I played the game entirely in first person with the virtual wheel) it took me a while to consistently use it correctly, but eventually I was able to maintain solid muscle memory and avoid tracking-steering mishaps.

I did feel that the aesthetics were a bit downgraded from Forever (mainly the less vibrant environments/objects), but this could probably be attributed to the transition to VR and/or the capabilities of the hardware.

Overall I think it's a great experience. I haven't spent a lot of time with other VR racers but I would recommend this to anyone interested.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for the kind review!
